'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 53''' was the fifty-third issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[January 1]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*The Search for [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Amidala's]] [[Assassin/Legends|Assassin]]
*[[Zam Wesell/Legends|Zam Wesell]]
*[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]
*[[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] - [[Docking Bay 327/Legends|Docking Bay 327]]
*[[11-17-series mining droid|11-17 mining droid]]
*[[Darth Vader's lightsaber/Legends|Darth Vader's lightsaber]] {{ID|Darth Vader's lightsabre}}
*[[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|Trade Federation Droid starfighter]]
